title: poa cerealis
intro: Poa cerealis, also known as meadow grass or common meadow grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Poa cerealis include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the relief of menstrual cramps. Poa cerealis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
